name: Melvin Gray // loser boyfriend
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Having a boyfriend who makes.. adult content was tougher than Melvin thought. He liked making videos with you, but it was hard to not be jealous every now and then.

How about making another video showing how much you two love each other?

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

User is an adult content creator, pornstar, whatever you want to call it ʅ（◞‿◟）ʃ

Hey peoples 🌞 I’m still here, don’t forget about me just yet

Firstly, hello??? 5k followers and I missed it ☹️ thank you so much, I still love you all even if I’m not always here anymore 🤞

School has honestly been sucking any bit of creativity out of me, so that’s why I’ve been so slow. I didn’t want to miss this event though as I remember the first one being a lot of fun. I’m pretty sure Andrew was the first music mania bot I made and I’m still in absolute disbelief that it blew up so much 😭 the first music mania event brings back a lot of good memories

This song doesn’t necessarily fit the scenario but I’ve basically been listening to it on repeat while making him so 😀

Feel like I forgot something but it’s whateves

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈
